travelGuidelines: Important Guidelines: Follow all marked routes. Maintain decorum at the ghats. Do not litter the sacred river. Carry valid ID at all times.

packLiteDesc: Carry only minimal essentials in a small backpack to navigate easily through massive crowds.

threeHourRuleDesc: Always reach the designated bathing ghat at least 3 hours before the Shahi Snan Muhurat.

ramkundPanchvatiAlert: Current high-density alerts for Ramkund and Panchvati Banks. Crowd levels have reached the threshold. For your safety, please postpone your visits or consider Kapila Sangam as a nearby alternative.
heritageHeroSubtitle: Journey through the divine history, ancient mythology, and spiritual tapestry of Nashik.
historyKumbhHeading: History of Kumbh Mela in Nashik
reliveDivineMoments: Relive the divine moments from previous Singhasth gatherings through the decades.
discoverSaintsSub: Discover the revered spiritual masters, saints, and ascetic orders that guide millions.
akhadaInfoDesc: The Akhadas are ancient ascetic orders of martial monks and sadhus. During the Nashik Kumbh Mela, prominent Akhadas like Niranjani, Juna, Maha Nirvani, and the Vaishnava Akhadas lead the grand processions (Peshwai) and take the first holy bath (Shahi Snan) before ordinary pilgrims.
culturalLandmarksSub: Key cultural landmarks that resonate with divine energy.
experienceDivineHeroSub: "Connecting Hearts to the Supreme. Book personalized virtual Poojas guided by renowned Acharyas at the holy Maha Kumbh."
noStreamsAvailable: No live streams available at the moment.
alignPrayersSub: Align your prayers according to the Vedic traditions for maximum spiritual benefit.
selectPriestSub: Select a revered priest to perform your personalized virtual pooja with complete devotion.
poojaBookingSuccess: Your pooja booking has been submitted successfully.
supportSacredSub: Plan your spiritual path and contribute to the divine cause of Maha Kumbh Mela 2027.
aiPlannerSub: Discover the smartest way to manage your expenses during the Kumbh Mela.
generousDonationSub: Your generous donation supports Anna Daan and Mela facilitation.
giftEligibilityDesc: You are eligible for an exclusive framed Lord Shiva image as a return gift.
scanUpiSub: Scan the QR code using any UPI application for a quick and secure contribution.
submitTransactionSub: Submit your transaction details for verification
donationSuccessText: Your donation details have been submitted for verification. Thank you for your support.
sustainabilityHeroSub: Preserving the sacred essence of Nashik through mindful devotion.
chooseSustainableSub: Choose sustainable travel practices to honor the environment on your pilgrimage.
publicTransportDesc: Opt for dedicated pilgrim trains and shuttle services. Our specialized transport network reduces regional congestion and helps maintain the air purity of the holy city.
carpoolingDesc: Connect with fellow devotees and share your journey. Carpooling fosters a sense of community while significantly reducing the carbon footprint of your visit.
localNatureDesc: Within the Mela Kshetra, prioritize walking or using electric rickshaws. The pedestrian-friendly layout around the Ghats ensures a peaceful and safe experience for all.
mindfulPracticesSub: Spiritual devotion is complete only when we protect the elements of nature provided by the Divine.
wasteDisposalDesc: Maintain the sanctity of the grounds. Use the color-coded disposal points: Green for wet/organic waste and Blue for dry/recyclable waste.
respectRiverDesc: The Godavari is the lifeline of Nashik. Prevent pollution by avoiding the use of chemical cleansers or disposing of non-biodegradable items in the sacred waters.
zeroPlasticDesc: Embrace traditional alternatives. Carry cloth bags for offerings and use copper or steel bottles. Refill stations are available throughout the Mela area.
consciousDonationSub: Ensure your charity supports both the people and the planet. Mindful giving is the highest form of Seva.
donationTip1: Prioritize donations to official Anna Kshetras for organized food distribution.
donationTip2: Donate lasting essentials like warm blankets or metal utensils that reduce single-use waste.
donationTip3: Choose digital payment methods for your contributions to reduce paper consumption.
donationTip4: Ensure that any physical offerings are not packaged in single-use plastic.
donationTip5: Participate in organic composting initiatives for any leftover food offerings.
locateBinsSub: Locate authorized Green & Blue disposal points across the sacred Mela grounds.
protectSacredSub: Be a part of the spiritual solution. Let's protect our sacred elements and holy river Godavari through unified mindful action.
reusableVesselsDesc: Carry your own traditional copper or steel water vessels for the journey.
cottonBagsDesc: Use natural fiber bags for your offerings and market purchases.
ecoVendorsDesc: Encourage businesses that utilize biodegradable leaf-based packaging (Patravallis).
mindfulInfluenceDesc: Guide your fellow devotees in maintaining the purity of the sacred grounds.
maintenanceSub: We are currently enhancing your spiritual digital experience. Our site is undergoing scheduled maintenance to bring you more immersive updates for the upcoming Maha Kumbh Mela.
spiritualQuote: "Wait with patience, and the fruits of your faith will be even more divine."
policy_guide_1: 1. Maintain Sanctity: Please respect the sacred nature of the Kumbh Mela. Dress modestly and avoid entering holy areas with footwear.
policy_guide_2: 2. Environmental Care: Do not use single-use plastics or pollute the river. Use the designated colored bins for waste disposal.
policy_guide_3: 3. Safety First: Always follow the designated routes, stay with your group, and cooperate with volunteers and police personnel.
policy_guide_4: 4. Health & Hygiene: Carry essential medicines and a reusable water bottle. Medical camps are stationed throughout the Kshetra.
policy_terms_1: By using this spiritual platform, you agree to our standard terms of service. You must be responsible for complying with any applicable local laws.
policy_terms_2: Our platform handles bookings on a best-effort basis and acts as a facilitator for various services related to the Maha Kumbh Mela.
policy_terms_3: Please note that all ticket purchases, pooja bookings, and accommodation reservations are subject to the respective service providers' unique terms.
policy_privacy_1: We take your sacred privacy seriously. We only collect essential information required to provide you with our services and update you on the Kumbh Mela.
policy_privacy_2: Your personal data is securely stored using advanced encryption and never shared with third parties for marketing purposes without your explicit prior consent.
policy_accessibility_1: We are immensely committed to making our platform accessible to everyone, ensuring all devotees can participate in the sacred journey easily.
policy_accessibility_2: We continually improve the user experience for everyone, applying the relevant universal accessibility standards. If you encounter any barriers, contact our support team.
shopHeroSubtitle: Take home the blessings of Maha Kumbh. Explore authentic religious artifacts, local handicrafts, and sacred prasad.
marketplaceSubtitle: Explore our collection of religious products and local handicrafts.
supportArtisansDesc: Our marketplace provides a platform for talented local artisans to showcase their traditional skills and reach a wider audience. Every purchase directly contributes to their livelihood and helps preserve our rich cultural heritage.
trackOrderDesc: Enter your Order ID below to check the status of your delivery.
divineOfferingsOnWay: Your divine offerings are on the way.
healthHeroSubtitle: "Your well-being is our divine duty. Experience a safe, healthy, and blissful spiritual journey at the holy Maha Kumbh."
